The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed primarily focus on complications related to alcoholic liver disease and other acute conditions, with no mention of lipid abnormalities or ongoing management of such conditions. The medications prescribed and procedures performed also do not indicate any treatment or evaluation related to lipid metabolism disorders. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is not reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
